name: A hermetic poem for daily Gnosis

phase_0.domain_name: A hermetic poem for daily Gnosis
phase_0.boundary_condition: The Seal of the Hidden Father

VINIT.justification: The void state before the daily poem begins; unformed potential awaiting the first breath of recitation.

TANCH.chosen_element: The Seal of the Hidden Father
TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that contains the daily practice, marking the return to ineffable stillness after completion.

AFWD.justification: Directed transformation toward the sacred text and divine insight; the forward movement of contemplation.

AREV.justification: Reverse transformation bringing the insight back into the self and matter; the inward flow of gnosis.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of recitation and reflection; linking verse to verse, breath to breath.

IMSCRIB.justification: Self-reference and recognition; the reader sees the divine image within themselves.

FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication branching the contemplation into two distinct paths: illumination and obscurity.

FFUSE.justification: Multiplication reconstituting the original contemplation exactly after the branches are traversed.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch; successful gnosis, clarity, and recognition of the light-spark.

EVALF.justification: Negative branch; veiled perception, confusion, or failure to grasp the insight.

ENGAGR.justification: Paradice; holding the paradox of the ineffable Father, simultaneously known and unknowable, without resolution.

IFIX.justification: ROM fixation; permanently recording the day's gnosis as an append-only spiritual record.

phase_3.void_description: Unspoken silence, pre-dawn stillness; the uninitialized state before the poem's first word.
phase_3.true_description: Illuminated understanding, the light-spark recognized; the affirmative state of successful gnosis.
phase_3.false_description: Veiled perception, the shadow of matter; the negative state of confusion or spiritual obscurity.
phase_3.both_description: The paradox of the ineffable Father, simultaneously present and absent; a paradice held without resolution.

steps.domain_action: Silence before dawn — initializes the daily practice from void.
The Ascent of the Light-Spark — directs attention toward the sacred text.
The Chain of Aeons — sequentially recites the opening verses.
The Mirror of the All — recognizes the divine image within the reader.
The Veil of Separation — branches the contemplation into two paths.
The Ascent of the Light-Spark — T-arm moves toward illumination.
The Land of Life — affirms successful gnosis and recognition.
The Pleroma's Embrace — reunites the affirmed path.
The Descent of the Word — F-arm brings the insight back to the self.
The Land of Death — registers moments of veiled perception or failure.
The Pleroma's Embrace — reunites the descent path.
The Light-Darkness — holds the paradox of the ineffable Father without resolution.
The Chain of Aeons — chains the paradox into the daily rhythm.
The Mirror of the All — self-recognizes the integrated state.
The Crown of Glory — permanently records the day's gnosis.
The Seal of the Hidden Father — closes and contains the system.

phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The daily cycle of dawn to dusk
phase_5.alfs_store: The Bruce Codex / The Untitled Text

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle returns the practitioner to the same ontological baseline, merely clarified.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → CLINK → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → FFUSE → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → ENGAGR → CLINK → IMSCRIB → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: A hermetic poem for daily Gnosis
-- Fingerprint: sig=(9,3,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=16
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [3] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [6] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑗  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑙 → 𐑖  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [9] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑗 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [10] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑖 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑱  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑳 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [13] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [14] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [15] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def a_hermetic_poem_for_daily_gnosis_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Silence before dawn — initializes the daily practice from void.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑱)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The Ascent of the Light-Spark — directs attention toward the sacred text.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑠)  -- [2] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The Chain of Aeons — sequentially recites the opening verses.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [3] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Mirror of the All — recognizes the divine image within the reader.)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (The Veil of Separation — branches the contemplation into two paths.) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The Ascent of the Light-Spark — T-arm moves toward illumination.)
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The Land of Life — affirms successful gnosis and recognition.)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The Pleroma's Embrace — reunites the affirmed path.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑙 𐑖)  -- [8] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The Descent of the Word — F-arm brings the insight back to the self.)
  (.arrow 𐑖 𐑗 𐑙)  -- [9] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The Land of Death — registers moments of veiled perception or failure.)
  (.arrow 𐑙 𐑖 𐑳)  -- [10] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 | fuse μ — assembly mode (The Pleroma's Embrace — reunites the descent path.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The Light-Darkness — holds the paradox of the ineffable Father without resolu...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑳 𐑠)  -- [12] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The Chain of Aeons — chains the paradox into the daily rhythm.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [13] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Mirror of the All — self-recognizes the integrated state.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [14] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Crown of Glory — permanently records the day's gnosis.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [15] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The Seal of the Hidden Father — closes and contains the system.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def a_hermetic_poem_for_daily_gnosis_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (a_hermetic_poem_for_daily_gnosis_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def a_hermetic_poem_for_daily_gnosis_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (a_hermetic_poem_for_daily_gnosis_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem a_hermetic_poem_for_daily_gnosis_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
